description_long: This is a single tan leather heeled shoe with a closed toe and slip-on design, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The upper is crafted from a light brown leather material, with subtle seam lines and a gently rounded toe box. The heel is block-shaped, medium in height, and appears to be made of a stacked or molded material in a darker brown shade. The shoe lacks any visible laces or fasteners, emphasizing its slip-on nature. There is a small, raised detail on the outer side, possibly a brand mark, but no clear logo is visible. The overall construction suggests a formal or semi-formal style suitable for urban environments.
description: A tan leather slip-on heeled shoe with a smooth finish and block heel, designed for formal or semi-formal urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan leather upper, block heel, and a small raised detail near the collar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe box and seamless slip-on design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth leather surface and the full profile of the block heel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel's width and the central seam running up the back.
